purpose: Define a one-point bridge from source-safe TyA/Cinepolis real-data preview into the existing CX.data shape without rewriting UI modules or importing raw data.

targetFacade.name: CX.data
targetFacade.singleFutureConnectionPoint: app/core/data.js or a single preloaded adapter chosen under explicit gate
targetFacade.currentRuntimeObservation: app/core/data.js still declares Mock data layer and generic demo projects; this bridge is not connected yet.

rules: Cinepolis must be a normal configurable project
Cinepolis must not be global hardcoded logic
HR source URL must be private config only
questionnaire source must be project/visit configurable

visits.source: sanitized HR row preview after canonical staging
rules: No raw shopper names, phones or emails in source-safe preview

shoppers.source: sanitized shopper map preview after duplicate review
rules: SHOPPER_REVIEW remains review_required until canonical mismatch resolved
Already-presented certifications must not be requested again unless project rule says so

liquidations.source: liquidation candidates preview + external finance crosscheck
rules: June pending is payment/liquidation control, not pending visits
Paid requires audited evidence or external payment reference

manifest_only.description: Create source-safe project/period metadata only. No visits/shoppers imported.

preview_readonly.description: Build an in-memory CX.data-compatible preview from sanitized inputs. No writes.

local_seed_preview.description: Blocked until explicit approval because it can affect visible local runtime.

firestore_readonly.description: Blocked until clean backend and rules are reviewed.

firestore_write.description: Blocked until explicit GO, rollback and validated staging.

blockingIssuesBeforeRuntime: Runtime still uses generic demo data in app/core/data.js
Need sanitized HR row preview or local source-safe input to populate visits
DPI/sensitive shopper policy must be enforced
questionnaire_marks duplicate must not be used independently
liquidations require finance crosscheck before paid state
